validators_passed: flutter_name_drift_refs_gone: OK — 0 NAME_DRIFT_FLUTTER_RENAMED refs remaining in drift
notes: Total occurrences fixed: 54 across 15 files. Repository pattern: Flutter SDK uses service locator via AmitySocialClient.newPostRepository() / AmityCoreClient.newUserRepository() factory methods — no public constructors. All constructor-form usages (e.g. AmityPostRepository(client: client)) replaced with the factory call; type annotation usages replaced with bare type name (PostRepository, UserRepository). AmityPollRepository verified: AmitySocialClient.newPollRepository() exists in surface (flutter.json, AmitySocialClient.members, signature: 'static PollRepository newPollRepository()'). AmityContentFlagReason: dart block correctly uses lowerCamelCase statics; kotlin block uses PascalCase nested objects — both now correct per their respective platforms. Remaining drift 26 issues are TRUE_FABRICATION (13) and FLUTTER_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE (4) rows held for SDK-lead meeting, plus a few AmityStreamStatus/AmityStreamStatus.error refs which are separate rows.
